articles.title: Strategy sold 32 BTC for $2.5 million in late May, filing shows
articles.description: The 8-K filing Monday says proceeds from the May 26-31 sale, executed at an average price of $77,135 a coin, will fund distributions on Strategy's preferred stock.

articles.title: Strava declares war on scrapers ahead of IPO
articles.description: Strava will charge a flat monthly fee from developers to access its API

articles.title: Bitcoin ETPs post largest 2026 outflow as crypto funds bleed $1.67B
articles.description: Crypto ETPs see $1.67 billion in outflows as the US dominates selling, Bitcoin funds log a record 2026 exit, and altcoin participation narrows sharply across markets, according to CoinShares.

articles.title: Binance adds US stock trading in push beyond crypto
articles.description: Binance launched US equities trading for eligible users and plans tokenized stocks as crypto exchanges expand into broader financial markets.

articles.title: ECB official says stablecoins risk importing old market flaws
articles.description: ECB board member Isabel Schnabel warned that stablecoins could bring money-market risks into tokenized finance and reinforce US dollar dominance.

articles.title: Cardano Summit 2026 canceled after community votes against Foundation funding proposal
articles.description: The Cardano Foundation's flagship conference was scrapped after a funding proposal failed to secure the two-thirds support required under the blockchain's new governance system.

articles.title: Strategy holds STRC dividend at 11.5% for fourth straight month
articles.description: The preferred stock remains near its $100 par value as the company balances yield stability, ATM issuance capacity, and its bitcoin acquisition strategy.

articles.title: Bitcoin, ether start June in the red while futures show taste for risk. XLM, HYPE gain
articles.description: Bitcoin and ether fell Monday after dropping in May, a month that usually sees them post positive returns. U.S. equity index futures rose.

articles.title: Bitcoin and software stocks are breaking up — and history says a major crypto move is coming
articles.description: Bitcoin and software equities have sharply diverged after moving in lockstep for years, raising questions over whether bitcoin will eventually catch up.

articles.title: Unastella, a South Korean rocket startup that launched from home, raises $24M
articles.description: The Seoul-based rocket startup is developing its own launch vehicles and engines.

articles.title: Coinbase launches rupee bank rails in India after FIU nod
articles.description: Coinbase has switched on direct rupee bank transfers in India via IMPS, letting users move funds between local bank accounts and the exchange for spot and futures trading.
